articles.title: Antonelli beats team mate Russell in final Japan practice
articles.summary: Antonelli beats team mate Russell in final Japan practice. Kimi Antonelli finished fastest in Free Practice 3 ahead of the Japanese Grand Prix, beating team mate George Russell as Mercedes continued their strong start to 2026.

articles.title: Stella not worried about repeat of ‘exceptional’ double DNS
articles.summary: Stella not worried about repeat of ‘exceptional’ double DNS. McLaren were left reeling after both Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri were ruled out of the Chinese Grand Prix, but team boss Andrea Stella is confident it won’t happen again.

articles.title: Binotto confirms Audi looking for Wheatley replacement
articles.summary: Binotto confirms Audi looking for Wheatley replacement. Mattia Binotto will be covering Jonathan Wheatley's duties in the interim after the Briton departed Audi with immediate effect.

articles.summary: Japanese Grand Prix best Qualifying bets available. With the countdown to Qualifying now on, we assess the best available bets on the market.

articles.title: Watch the action from Round 1 of the F1 Sim Racing World Championship
articles.summary: Watch the action from Round 1 of the F1 Sim Racing World Championship. The 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship gets underway on Friday with drivers set to begin the season at the Shanghai International Circuit.

articles.summary: Follow Qualifying from Round 1 of the F1 Sim Racing World Championship. The F1 Sim Racing World Championship is back for another season of action, with Round 1 kicking things off as the sim racers prepare to tackle the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.summary: Are McLaren a threat to Mercedes in Japan?. McLaren ended Friday on top at the Japanese Grand Prix, but how do the reigning champions stack up compared to their rivals?

articles.title: Suzuka FP1 outing ‘pretty incredible’ for Crawford despite limited running
articles.summary: Suzuka FP1 outing ‘pretty incredible’ for Crawford despite limited running. Aston Martin reserve driver Jak Crawford described the Suzuka circuit is “pretty incredible to drive" despite being limited to three flying laps during his FP1 outing for the team at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Honda says Aston Martin’s chassis, not just its power unit, is a factor in vibration problems
articles.summary: Honda says Aston Martin’s chassis, not just its power unit, is a factor in vibration problems. Honda Racing Corporation President Koji Watanabe says the vibration issues being suffered by Aston Martin are not solely down to the power unit itself, but also its integration with the chassis.

articles.title: McLaren downplays Friday pace at Suzuka
articles.summary: McLaren downplays Friday pace at Suzuka. McLaren says its Friday pace is likely to be an outlier despite Oscar Piastri setting the fastest time during the second practice session for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Piastri puts McLaren on top in second Japanese GP practice session
articles.summary: Piastri puts McLaren on top in second Japanese GP practice session. After shadowing the two Mercedes earlier in the day, McLaren's Oscar Piastri topped the field in Friday's second practice session for the Japanese GP at Suzuka.

articles.title: Russell continues Mercedes dominance in opening Japanese GP practice
articles.summary: Russell continues Mercedes dominance in opening Japanese GP practice. George Russell beat Mercedes teammate Kimi Antonelli to top spot in the first practice session for the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Technical updates: 2026 Japanese Grand Prix
articles.summary: Technical updates: 2026 Japanese Grand Prix. Red Bull's upgrade package leads the list of technical developments as it looks to address its early handling difficulties at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.summary: Verstappen demands journalist's removal from media session. Max Verstappen refused to start his media session at the Japanese Grand Prix on Thursday until a journalist from UK outlet The Guardian left the room due to his ongoing objection to a question the journalist asked at last year’s F1 title-de...

articles.title: Guarded optimism from drivers after FIA changes energy to bolster qualifying at Suzuka
articles.summary: Guarded optimism from drivers after FIA changes energy to bolster qualifying at Suzuka. The FIA has approved a change of conditions related to energy recharge limits in order to try and improve the qualifying challenge at the Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Norris still confident the McLaren can become the best F1 car of 2026
articles.summary: Norris still confident the McLaren can become the best F1 car of 2026. Lando Norris says McLaren is pushing hard to catch Mercedes and feels its 2026 car has “a lot of potential” ahead of this weekend’s Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Verstappen keen to race in Super GT after Fuji outing
articles.summary: Verstappen keen to race in Super GT after Fuji outing. Max Verstappen says he would love to race a Super GT car after driving a Nissan Z GT500 at Fuji Speedway ahead of this weekend’s Japanese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Russell surprised by McLaren pace in Japan practice
articles.summary: Russell surprised by McLaren pace in Japan practice. McLaren's Oscar Piastri sets the pace in second practice at the Japanese Grand Prix ahead of the Mercedes of Kimi Antonelli and George Russell.

articles.summary: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag podcast, Sam Bird believes Lewis Hamilton's spark "is back" again after the British driver finished in third at the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.summary: 'The tide is turning back towards Hamilton' - Priestley. The Chequered Podcast's Harry Benjamin, Jennie Gow and Marc Priestly discuss Lewis Hamilton's strong performance in the Australian Grand Prix, plus his 'upbeat, positive' mood over race weekend.
